name: Can I sue my employer instead of workers comp in Saint George?
description: No, comp is exclusive unless intentional harm.[1][4]

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer instead of workers comp in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, comp is exclusive unless intentional harm.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Generally no—Utah/Idaho workers' comp is exclusive remedy for work injuries, barring gross negligence or intentional acts.[1][4] Can't do both.[4] Key factors: Third-party suits ok if others liable (e.g., equipment maker).[3] Practical guidance: File comp first; sue others separately if applicable. Rare employer suits need strong proof. Comp faster, guaranteed if eligible.
